payload.corrected_method: Cross an event-loop turn after each explicit GC before the closed queryObjects read.

payload.result: The unchanged exact-head SDK lifecycle row reproduced 0/1/2 in six same-microtask observations and produced 0/0/1 in six event-loop-turn observations. The exact retaining reference path remains unknown; no product-owned retained path was established.
